x-kubernetes-validations.message: binlogServer size cannot be more than 1
binlogServer is required when pitr is enabled
binlogServer.image is required when pitr is enabled
binlogServer.size is required when pitr is enabled
mysql.image is required
mysql.size must be greater than 0
orchestrator.image is required when orchestrator is enabled
orchestrator.size must be greater than 0 when orchestrator is enabled
pmm.image is required when pmm is enabled
haproxy.image is required when haproxy is enabled
haproxy.size must be greater than 0 when haproxy is enabled
router.image is required when router is enabled
router.size must be greater than 0 when router is enabled
toolkit.image is required
Invalid configuration: When 'mysql.clusterType' is set to 'async', 'orchestrator.enabled' must be true unless 'unsafeFlags.orchestrator' is enabled
Invalid configuration: When 'mysql.clusterType' is set to 'async', 'proxy.haproxy.enabled' must be true unless 'unsafeFlags.proxy' is enabled
Invalid configuration: When 'mysql.clusterType' is set to 'async', 'proxy.router.enabled' must be disabled
Invalid configuration: Scaling MySQL replicas below 3 requires 'unsafeFlags.mysqlSize: true'
Invalid configuration: For 'group replication', scaling MySQL replicas above 9 requires 'unsafeFlags.mysqlSize: true'
Invalid configuration: For 'group replication', using an even number of MySQL replicas requires 'unsafeFlags.mysqlSize: true'
Invalid configuration: For 'group replication', MySQL Router or HAProxy must be enabled unless 'unsafeFlags.proxy' is enabled
Invalid configuration: For 'group replication', Router size must be 2 or greater unless 'unsafeFlags.proxySize' is enabled
Invalid configuration: For 'group replication', MySQL size must be 3 or greater unless 'unsafeFlags.mysqlSize' is enabled
Invalid configuration: For 'async' replication, Orchestrator size must be 3 or greater and odd unless 'unsafeFlags.orchestratorSize' is enabled
Invalid configuration: For 'async' replication, SmartUpdate requires Orchestrator to be enabled
Invalid configuration: MySQL Router and HAProxy can't be enabled at the same time
x-kubernetes-validations.rule: !(self.proxy.router != null && has(self.proxy.router.enabled) && self.proxy.router.enabled && self.proxy.haproxy != null && has(self.proxy.haproxy.enabled) && self.proxy.haproxy.enabled)
